verdict_summary: h2_end_stream 2->1 fix did NOT unblock SPA: page navigated to /search/<uuid> but answer area remained empty for full 30s+ wait, no Korean warning rendered, no RRN decode either.

evidence.console_errors_excerpt: Multiple ERR_HTTP2_COMPRESSION_ERROR on POST https://www.perplexity.ai/rest/event/analytics and GET https://www.perplexity.ai/rest/homepage-widgets/upsell?version=2.18 ; CORS-blocked script load redirected to perplexity-ai.cloudflareaccess.com (restricted-feature-loader-BOVIntqV.js) net::ERR_FAILED ; FedCM disabled previous user action ; [GSI_LOGGER]: FedCM get() rejects with NetworkError

recommendation: Re-audit etap.log for run_id 20260507-174759-93691: confirm engine actually fired V7-D envelope on this submission AND verify h2_end_stream=1 was applied at envelope-emit time (DB reload may have hit cache). Also check for ERR_HTTP2_COMPRESSION_ERROR correlation: if engine sets compression flags incorrectly on END_STREAM=1 frame, browser rejects body. Possible next: dump h2 frame hex via etap-bench packet capture, OR test with H/2 compression disabled in engine response template.
notes: Search URL navigation confirms perplexity SPA accepted the submit and called /perplexity_ask backend. URL update happened ~within 1s of Enter press. Answer-block React component never mounted any text node (verified via Snapshot DOM at +30s and +35s — only 답변 tab visible, body empty). Console shows multiple ERR_HTTP2_COMPRESSION_ERROR on analytics endpoints which is unusual — could indicate H/2 frame corruption from intercept. ERR_HTTP2_COMPRESSION_ERROR specifically suggests HPACK header compression mismatch, distinct from prior delayed-END_STREAM symptom. RRN absent (S2 holds, no regression). Verdict: FAIL_text_no_render — h2_end_stream fix alone insufficient.
